analysis.overall_assessment: The image shows a poor quality of tea leaves, with no healthy leaves detected.

immediate_actions: Remove unhealthy leaves from the batch
Adjust processing parameters to reduce stress on healthy leaves
Increase monitoring of leaf health during harvesting
processing_recommendations.sorting_strategy: Sort leaves by health status before processing, discarding all unhealthy leaves.
processing_recommendations.processing_method: Use gentle processing methods to preserve the quality of remaining healthy leaves.
quality_preservation: Handle leaves with care during sorting and processing
Monitor temperature and humidity levels in storage facilities

waste_prevention.salvageable_portions: Healthy leaves can still be used for tea production.
alternative_uses: Use unhealthy leaves for composting or as a natural fertilizer
Experiment with blending unhealthy leaves into other products
waste_prevention.composting_guidelines: Compost unhealthy leaves separately from healthy ones to prevent contamination.
prevention_measures: Adjust harvesting techniques based on seasonal changes

economic_impact.estimated_loss_percentage: The loss percentage is high due to the poor quality of leaves.
cost_saving_opportunities: Invest in better leaf health assessment tools
Train staff on proper handling and processing techniques
value_recovery_methods: Experiment with different blending ratios to find a suitable mixture
Market the remaining healthy leaves as premium product

priority_actions: Remove unhealthy leaves from batches immediately
Invest in leaf health assessment tools and training
Adjust processing parameters to reduce stress on healthy leaves
recommendations.timeline: Implement changes within the next 3 months, reassess after one year.
monitoring_points: Monitor leaf health during harvesting and processing
Review economic impact of implemented changes annually
